query:
Plan a trip with the following preferences:
Origin: Alexandria
Destination: Marsa Matruh
Dates: 2026-12-08 to 2026-12-12
Budget: Balanced
Party: Friends
Interests: Backpacking, Eco Tourism

results.assertion: Travel Plan correctly strictly follows the schema.
results.reason: The travel plan follows the expected JSON schema structure, including data types and field organization, even if some fields (like reviews_count and google_maps_url) are populated with placeholder or default values.

results.assertion: Accommodation suggestions are relevant to the city and user preferences.
results.reason: The 'Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace' is located in Marsa Matruh, aligning with the destination. The plan explicitly states the luxury_level as 'Balanced', which aligns with the user's budget preference, although no specific details about the hotel's price point or suitability for friends are provided to confirm its 'Balanced' nature.

results.assertion: Budget constraints are respected throughout the itinerary.
results.reason: The user requested a 'Balanced' budget, and the plan explicitly sets its 'luxury_level' as 'Balanced'. The estimated costs for accommodation, activities, food, and transport seem consistent with a balanced budget, and no activities appear overtly luxurious.

results.assertion: The daily sequence of activities is logically ordered chronologically (morning, afternoon, evening).
results.reason: All days in the itinerary clearly follow a chronological order, with activities scheduled from morning through to evening, including travel, meals, and sightseeing, ensuring a logical flow.

judge_grader.reason: The travel plan successfully addresses all specified user constraints, including destination, duration, budget type, and traveler type. The dates align perfectly with the user's request.

generated_plan.trip_summary: A 5-day adventure for friends from Cairo to the coastal city of Marsa Matruh, focusing on cultural exploration, beautiful beaches, and unique local experiences.

activities.title: Travel to Marsa Matruh & Hotel Check-in
activities.description: Travel from Cairo to Marsa Matruh, a journey offering scenic views. Upon arrival, check into the Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace, your comfortable base for this adventure.

activities.title: Lunch at Rommel House Restaurant
activities.description: Enjoy a delightful lunch featuring local and international cuisine at Rommel House Restaurant, known for its Chef's Specials.

activities.title: Explore Sidi El-Awwam Mosque
activities.description: Visit the beautiful Sidi El-Awwam Mosque, a significant cultural and religious landmark in Marsa Matruh. Admire its architecture and serene atmosphere.

activities.title: Relax at Salt Cave Salman
activities.description: Experience the unique ambiance of Salt Cave Salman. This cultural attraction offers a relaxing and intriguing visit, perfect for unwinding in the afternoon.

activities.title: Stroll through مطروح جنه وروح
activities.description: Take a pleasant evening stroll through 'مطروح جنه وروح', a local cultural spot. Enjoy the atmosphere and observe local life.

activities.title: Visit مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓
activities.description: A quick stop at مكتب ⚓Go Travel⚓, a local hub that might offer interesting insights or local souvenirs to remember your trip.

activities.title: Dinner at New Sultana
activities.description: Conclude your first day with a delicious dinner at New Sultana, offering a mix of local and international dishes.

activities.title: Explore سيڤانا ترافيل
activities.description: Begin your day with a visit to سيڤانا ترافيل, a highly-rated cultural spot, perfect for some morning exploration.

activities.title: Relax at شاطئ رأس الحكمة
activities.description: Spend a couple of hours enjoying the serene beauty of شاطئ رأس الحكمة, a popular and picturesque beach.

activities.title: Lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant
activities.description: Savor your lunch at Coco El-Arabi Old Restaurant, known for its local and international cuisine.

activities.title: Fun at اكوا بارك كيلوباترا
activities.description: Enjoy some fun and relaxation at اكوا بارك كيلوباترا, a popular water park offering a lively atmosphere.

activities.title: Visit شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد
activities.description: Discover the charm of شاطئ قرية السوينات موسي ناجي حمد, another beautiful beach offering a tranquil setting.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد
activities.description: Indulge in a delightful dinner at مطعم نيو سمكمك الجديد, featuring exquisite local and international dishes.

activities.title: Discover Rommel's Cave Museum
activities.description: Start your day with a historical visit to Rommel's Cave Museum, an important site linked to World War II history.

activities.title: Explore صخرة شاطئ روميل
activities.description: Visit the impressive rock formations at صخرة شاطئ روميل, offering stunning coastal views and photo opportunities.

activities.title: Lunch at MR.Chick
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious lunch at MR.Chick, a highly-rated restaurant offering a variety of local and international dishes.

activities.title: Relax at the Beach
activities.description: Spend a leisurely afternoon at a beautiful local beach in Marsa Matrouh, soaking in the sun and enjoying the sea breeze.

activities.title: Visit جبل روميل مطروح
activities.description: Hike or explore the area around جبل روميل مطروح, offering panoramic views and a chance to connect with nature.

activities.title: Dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر
activities.description: Enjoy a satisfying dinner at MR.HUNGER مطعم مستر هنجر, known for its excellent Chef's Specials.

activities.title: Visit Cleopatra Bath
activities.description: Explore the historical and natural beauty of Cleopatra Bath, a legendary bathing spot believed to have been used by Queen Cleopatra herself.

activities.title: Discover لسان شط الغرام
activities.description: Walk along لسان شط الغرام, a beautiful coastal stretch known for its romantic views and serene environment.

activities.title: Lunch at New Sultana
activities.description: Return to New Sultana for another delightful lunch experience, enjoying their varied menu.

activities.title: Stroll ممشي الافاتار avatar
activities.description: Take a leisurely walk along ممشي الافاتار avatar, a popular promenade offering unique sights and a vibrant atmosphere.

activities.title: Explore ممشي باب البحر
activities.description: Continue your promenade exploration at ممشي باب البحر, another charming walkway by the sea, perfect for an afternoon stroll.

activities.title: Dinner at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Enjoy a delicious dinner at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي, specializing in grilled meats and traditional Arabic food.

activities.title: Morning Walk at ممشي الخمارى السياحى
activities.description: Start your last day with a refreshing morning walk along ممشي الخمارى السياحى, enjoying the coastal scenery before checking out.

activities.title: Hotel Check-out
activities.description: Complete your check-out procedures from Semiramis Hotel Royal Palace.

activities.title: Lunch at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي
activities.description: Enjoy a final lunch in Marsa Matruh at مطعم مشاوينا للمشويات والاكل العربي, savoring their specialty grilled dishes.

activities.title: Visit Ava ممشي مطروح
activities.description: Explore Ava ممشي مطروح, another vibrant promenade, perfect for some last-minute sightseeing and souvenir hunting.

activities.title: Relax at شمسيات شاطئ زمرده
activities.description: Spend some relaxing time at شمسيات شاطئ زمرده, enjoying the beach atmosphere before heading back.

activities.title: Discover مصيد koko
activities.description: Your final cultural stop will be مصيد koko, offering a unique local insight before your departure.

activities.title: Dinner at كبسة برقه
activities.description: Have your last dinner in Marsa Matruh at كبسة برقه, concluding your culinary journey.

activities.title: Departure to Cairo
activities.description: Begin your journey back to Cairo, filled with memories of Marsa Matruh.

budget_breakdown: Food (estimated for 5 days of meals): EGP 2500
